zh.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor是Gerald Windsor的女兒，於大約1143年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿爾維斯頓。她與Bertram de Verdun III結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1215年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾黑阿德爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor是Gerald Windsor的女儿，于大约1143年出生在英国瓦維其可爾阿爾維斯頓。她与Bertram de Verdun III结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1215年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾黑阿德爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor was born about 1143, in Alveston, Warwickshire, England as the daughter of Gerald Windsor. She married Bertram de Verdun III. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1215, in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor est née environ 1143, à Alveston, Warwickshire, Angleterre, fille de Gerald Windsor. Elle a épousé Bertram de Verdun III. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1215, à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor wurde um 1143 in Alveston, Warwickshire, England, als Tochter von Gerald Windsor geboren. Sie hat Bertram de Verdun III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1215 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor è nata il circa 1143 nel Alveston, Warwickshire, England come figlia di Gerald Windsor. Lei sposato Bertram de Verdun III. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1215, nel Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsorは約1143年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルベストンでGerald Windsorの娘として生まれた。Bertram de Verdun IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1215年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドルで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor(은)는 대략 1143년 영국 워윅실르 앨베스턴에서 Gerald Windsor의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Bertram de Verdun III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor nasceu aproximadamente 1143, em Alveston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra filha de Gerald Windsor. Ela casou-se com Bertram de Verdun III. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1215, em Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor родилась около 1143 г. в местности алвестон, варвиккшир, Англия. Её отца звали Gerald Windsor. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bertram de Verdun III. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1215 г. в местности чидл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rohesia de Windsor nació aproximadamente 1143, en Alveston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra como hija de Gerald Windsor. Se casó con Bertram de Verdun III. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1215, en Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
